data.current_description: Returns a list of active employees for the company. Use the include_terminated endpoint to also retrieve terminated employees.

data.current_summary: Push a candidate to the ATS
data.current_description: Pushes a new candidate into the Rippling Applicant Tracking System.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new candidate in the ATS system
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new candidate record in the Rippling Applicant Tracking System. Accepts a Candidate object with required fields including name, email, and position information. Returns a 201 Created response with the newly created candidate record including its assigned ID. This operation is idempotent for duplicate submissions within a short time window. Requires ATS administrator or recruiter permissions.

data.current_description: Processes (approves or denies) a pending leave request.
data.summary_suggestion: Approve or deny a pending leave request
data.description_suggestion: Processes a pending leave request by approving or denying it. Requires the leave request ID and a decision payload specifying the action (approve/deny) and optional reason. Returns the updated LeaveRequest object with the new status. Updates the employee's leave balance if approved. Only pending requests can be processed.
